items.title: Why Joby Aviation Stock Plummeted This Week
items.author: Keith Noonan
items.description: Joby Aviation experienced a 10.1% stock price decline last week due to macroeconomic risks, inflation concerns, and AI valuation pressures, but saw partial recovery after Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's speech suggesting potential interest rate cuts.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock experienced volatility with a 10.1% decline, but showed recovery potential due to positive regulatory progress and potential interest rate cuts. The company completed its first FAA-governed inter-airport trip, indicating technological advancement.
